Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-30-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Appearances:
Bruce Nelson, Esq. for Petitioner: Bernard traivs present as guardian ad litem for Dominique Travis a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and ompromise is approved.
Attorney's fees: $20,000.00
Costs $982.45
A net balance of $39,899.27 to be deposited into a blocked account with San Francisco Federal Credit Union, 770 Golden Gate Ave., San Francisco, CA., until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in court.
